name: overview_design_to_openapi
prompt: overview-design.mdをもとにAPI設計とOpenAPI 3.1仕様を作成してください。
expected_behavior: Reads the overview design as the source of truth.
Creates or updates api-design.md and openapi.yaml near the source document.
Uses REST-oriented resource paths and explains assumptions.
Includes request/response schemas, validation rules, common errors, and OpenAPI 3.1 components.
Does not assume fixed CSV column counts unless specified by the overview design.
